items: Create a dedicated quiet space in your home specifically for meditation practice
Create a dedicated meditation space in your home with essential items
Set your phone to airplane mode or Do Not Disturb during your daily meditation practice
Research and select one primary meditation posture that feels comfortable and sustainable for 10+ minute sessions
Read one foundational book about meditation and take notes on key concepts
Complete a 7-day meditation streak using a single technique to establish consistency
